---
name: Accessibility issue
about: Report a problem with the HVE Core documentation site or related public content
title: "Accessibility issue: "
labels:
  - accessibility
---

## Summary

Describe the accessibility problem you encountered.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Describe the action you were trying to complete.
2. Note the page or component involved.
3. Explain the barrier you experienced.

## Expected behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Environment

Provide browser, assistive technology, and operating system details when available.
